{{Quote|I need to ask you some questions if you have a moment to spare.|Falton Molard|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Falton Molard''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] found in the [[Hidden Rebel Base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] all the [[Datacard/Legends|data disks]] used by the Rebellion at the base were stolen by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]]. The spy was killed when his ship was shot down by the Alliance, but the data disks were destroyed as well. It fell to Molard to recompile all the lost data. He therefore had to question all operatives working for the local branch of the Alliance regarding their operations history.

==Behind the scenes==
Falton Molard is a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|Non-Player Character]] (NPC) in the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. He was added to the game after the [[:w:c:swg:Rebel Theme Park|Rebel Theme Park]], a series of missions for the Rebellion, was overhauled. Players who already finished the old version of the quest line can talk to him and reset the missions so they can run the revised version of the quest line, too.
